procedures.name: BlockPingpong_Small
procedures.heading: BlockPingpong_Small - 1 PP cluster with setprio interleaving (no cond_barrier)
procedures.description: Detects BlockPingpong scheduling with 1 PP cluster (numWarps=4)
procedures.message:
BlockPingpong Small (1 PP Cluster) Detected

CRITERIA:
  • numWarps = 4
  • numStages > 1
  • No amdgpu.cond_barrier (uses setprio interleaving only)
  • Single tt.dot operation per loop iteration
  • 262,144 ≤ tileSize ≤ 16,777,216 bits
procedures.pattern_checks:
CHECK-NOT: amdgpu.cond_barrier
CHECK: ttg.local_load
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 1
CHECK: tt.load
CHECK: rocdl.sched.barrier
CHECK: ttg.local_load
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 0
CHECK: tt.load
CHECK: rocdl.sched.barrier
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 1
CHECK: tt.dot
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 0

procedures.name: BlockPingpong_Medium
procedures.heading: BlockPingpong_Medium - 2 PP clusters with cond_barrier synchronization
procedures.description: Detects BlockPingpong scheduling with 2 PP clusters (numWarps=8)
procedures.message:
BlockPingpong Medium (2 PP Clusters) Detected

CRITERIA:
  • numWarps = 8
  • numStages = 2
  • Uses amdgpu.cond_barrier for inter-cluster synchronization
  • Two tt.dot operations per loop iteration
  • tileSize == 33,554,432 bits (medium tile exactly)
procedures.pattern_checks:
CHECK: gpu.barrier
CHECK: amdgpu.cond_barrier
CHECK: scf.for
CHECK: = ttg.local_load
CHECK: = ttg.local_load
CHECK: rocdl.sched.barrier 0
CHECK: tt.load
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 1
CHECK: = tt.dot
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 0
CHECK: gpu.barrier
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 1
CHECK: = tt.dot
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 0
CHECK: gpu.barrier
CHECK: scf.yield
CHECK: amdgpu.cond_barrier

procedures.name: BlockPingpong_Large
procedures.heading: BlockPingpong_Large - 4 PP clusters with cond_barrier synchronization
procedures.description: Detects BlockPingpong scheduling with 4 PP clusters (numWarps=8)
procedures.message:
BlockPingpong Large (4 PP Clusters) Detected

CRITERIA:
  • numWarps = 8
  • numStages = 2
  • Uses amdgpu.cond_barrier for inter-cluster synchronization
  • Four tt.dot operations per loop iteration
  • tileSize ≥ 67,108,864 bits
procedures.pattern_checks:
CHECK: gpu.barrier
CHECK: amdgpu.cond_barrier
CHECK: scf.for
CHECK: tt.load
CHECK: = ttg.local_load
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 1
CHECK: = tt.dot
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 0
CHECK: gpu.barrier
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 1
CHECK: = tt.dot
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 0
CHECK: gpu.barrier
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 1
CHECK: = tt.dot
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 0
CHECK: gpu.barrier
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 1
CHECK: tt.dot
CHECK: rocdl.s.setprio 0
CHECK: gpu.barrier
CHECK: scf.yield
CHECK: amdgpu.cond_barrier
